engineGuide.h2: Toyota Noah Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Toyota Noah across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: The 1AZ-FE powered early Noah models, bringing reliable VVT-i technology and strong mid-range torque for family hauling duties across UK grey imports.
compatibleVariants: Noah X, Noah G, Noah 4WD (AZR60G, AZR65G)
commonFailures: Oil consumption due to piston ring wear
entries.cta: Get quotes for 1AZ-FE Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: The 3ZR-FE brought improved fuel economy and lower emissions to the R70 generation, becoming the most common replacement engine for UK Noah owners.
compatibleVariants: Noah G, Noah X, Noah Si, Noah Voxy-compatible (ZRR70G, ZRR75G)
commonFailures: Oil consumption from piston ring design
entries.cta: Get quotes for 3ZR-FE Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Valvematic Petrol
entries.history: Valvematic technology on the 3ZR-FAE delivered variable valve lift for better efficiency, fitted to higher-spec Noah Si and Z variants from 2010.
compatibleVariants: Noah Si, Noah Z, Noah 7-seater (ZRR80G, ZRR85G)
commonFailures: VVT-i oil line leaks causing rattle
EGR valve clogging on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for 3ZR-FAE Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L/2.5L Petrol
entries.history: The 2AR-FE brought refined performance and improved thermal efficiency to the R80 generation, widely used in premium Noah G and Z trims.
compatibleVariants: Noah G, Noah Z, Noah Esquire-compatible (ZRR80G, MZRA90W)
commonFailures: Oil consumption from piston ring design (pre-2016)
Carbon buildup on direct injection variants
Timing chain guide wear on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2AR-FE Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 1.8L Hybrid
entries.history: The 2ZR-FXE Atkinson-cycle hybrid became the go-to choice for ULEZ-compliant Noah replacements, combining electric assist with proven reliability.
compatibleVariants: Noah Hybrid, Noah G Hybrid, Noah ULEZ spec (ZWR80G)
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2ZR-FXE Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Hybrid
entries.history: The latest Dynamic Force hybrid in the R90 Noah delivers class-leading efficiency with electric VVT-iE and regenerative braking integration.
compatibleVariants: Noah latest gen Hybrid, Noah R90 Hybrid (MZRA90W)
entries.cta: Get quotes for M20A-FXS Toyota Noah engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: The M20A-FKS brings Toyota's latest TNGA architecture to the Noah, featuring high-compression combustion and VVT-iE for maximum efficiency.
compatibleVariants: Noah R90, Noah latest gen petrol (MZRA90W)
entries.cta: Get quotes for M20A-FKS Toyota Noah engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Toyota Noah Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Toyota Noah's petrol and hybrid engines are generally robust, but UK grey import owners commonly face timing chain wear on 1AZ-FE units, oil consumption on 3ZR-FE/2AR-FE engines, and hybrid inverter faults on 2ZR-FXE models. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Failure - Why Toyota Noah 1AZ-FE Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.rootCause: The rear-mounted timing chain tensioner loses pressure over time, allowing chain slack that causes rattling and eventual jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides, chain before catastrophic failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early; 40k-60k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 1AZ-FE with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, warranty included

problems.recommendation: On a Noah worth £3,000-£6,000, a preventative chain replacement makes sense if the engine is otherwise healthy. If you're already hearing rattles or have misfires, replacement is the safer investment.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 1AZ-FE engine prices for your Toyota Noah

problems.h4: Oil Consumption Fix - Why Toyota Noah 3ZR-FE/2AR-FE Engines Burn Oil
problems.rootCause: Piston ring design allows oil to pass into combustion chamber, causing blue smoke and frequent top-ups.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve stem seals, oil control rings
Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded piston rings, dyno-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; eliminates oil burn completely

problems.recommendation: If your Noah is burning over 1L per 1,000 miles, ring replacement via a full rebuild is more cost-effective than repeated top-ups and risk of catalytic damage.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 3ZR-FE oil consumption repair on your Toyota Noah

problems.h4: Hybrid Inverter Fault - Why Toyota Noah 2ZR-FXE Systems Fail
problems.rootCause: Inverter cooling pump failure or capacitor degradation causes warning lights and loss of hybrid assist.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace cooling pump, capacitors, recalibrate MG1/MG2 sync
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if battery health is good; 30k-50k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 2ZR-FXE with new inverter, battery health check, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; restores full hybrid efficiency and ULEZ compliance

problems.recommendation: For ULEZ-zone Noah owners, investing in a rebuilt hybrid powertrain protects your zero-charge status and avoids repeated inverter repairs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2ZR-FXE hybrid engine prices for your Toyota Noah

problems.h4: VVT-i Oil Line Leak - Why Toyota Noah 3ZR-FAE Engines Rattle
problems.rootCause: High-pressure oil feed line to Valvematic actuator develops leaks, causing cam phaser rattle and reduced performance.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace oil feed line, seals, reset VVT-i adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Quick fix; resolves rattle if caught before actuator damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 3ZR-FAE with upgraded oil lines, Valvematic calibration, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; restores full Valvematic efficiency

problems.recommendation: If the rattle is new and oil level is stable, replace the line immediately. If performance is already affected, a rebuilt engine offers better long-term value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 3ZR-FAE VVT-i repair on your Toyota Noah

problems.h4: Carbon Buildup Intake - Why Toyota Noah Direct Injection Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Toyota Noah G, Z (2014-present, 2AR-FE DI variants)
problems.rootCause: Direct injection design allows carbon to accumulate on intake valves, restricting airflow and causing rough idle.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove intake manifold, blast valves with walnut media, reset adaptations
repairOptions.longevity: Effective preventative maintenance; repeat every 40k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 2AR-FE with updated intake design, dyno-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; eliminates recurring carbon issues

problems.recommendation: For high-mileage Noahs showing power loss, walnut blasting is a cost-effective first step. If symptoms persist, consider a rebuilt engine with improved intake design.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2AR-FE engine prices for your Toyota Noah

problems.h4: Water Pump Failure - Why Toyota Noah Engines Overheat
problems.rootCause: Plastic impeller or seal failure reduces coolant flow, leading to overheating and potential head gasket damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace pump, thermostat, coolant flush, pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Standard maintenance; prevents overheating if done proactively

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded pump, head gasket inspection, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary if overheating caused head warping or gasket failure

problems.recommendation: Replace the water pump at 80k miles as preventative maintenance. If overheating has already occurred, have the head checked before deciding between repair or replacement.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Noah overheating repair or engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Toyota Noah
finalCta.paragraph: From timing chain rattles to hybrid inverter faults, the Toyota Noah's common engine issues are well-documented and solvable. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Toyota Noah specialists who understand grey import vehicles. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - with nationwide delivery or supply & fit available. Compare prices today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Toyota Noah Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Toyota Noah and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

types.title: Toyota Noah Reconditioned Engines (Recon)

types.frontDescription: Professionally cleaned, inspected and lightly rebuilt units with worn parts replaced - ideal for lower-mileage Noah engines.
types.frontDisclaimer: Suitability depends on core engine condition and mileage history.
types.backDescription: Reconditioned Noah engines undergo thorough cleaning, inspection and replacement of visibly worn components like seals and gaskets. Best for engines with solid compression and no major failures.

Faster turnaround than full rebuilds - often 3-5 days
Includes 12-month warranty when sourced via EngineMarket

fuelTypes.h2: Toyota Noah Engines by Fuel Type
fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Toyota Noah engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early 1AZ-FE petrol to the latest M20A-FXS hybrid.

items.title: Toyota Noah Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol engines dominate the Noah range across all generations, with 2.0L units offering the best balance of power, reliability and parts availability for UK grey import owners.
items.descriptor: Petrol engines dominate the Noah range across all generations, with 2.0L units offering the best balance of power, reliability and parts availability for UK grey import owners.
items.familiesLabel: Common Toyota Noah Petrol Engine Families
families: 1AZ-FE - Early R60 workhorse (Noah X/G), timing chain tensioner wear common
3ZR-FE - R70 mainstream engine (Noah G/Si), oil consumption on high mileage
3ZR-FAE - Valvematic efficiency (Noah Si/Z), VVT-i oil line leaks reported
2AR-FE - R80 refined power (Noah G/Z), carbon buildup on DI variants
M20A-FKS - Latest TNGA efficiency (R90), early ECU mapping refinements
knownFor: Strong mid-range torque ideal for family hauling
Timing chain maintenance critical on pre-2010 units
Oil consumption fixable with upgraded piston rings
Carbon buildup manageable with walnut blasting service
items.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Noah Petrol replacement engines

items.title: Toyota Noah Hybrid Engines
items.description: Hybrid Noah models deliver ULEZ compliance and exceptional fuel economy, with the 2ZR-FXE and M20A-FXS powertrains requiring specialist calibration during replacement.
items.descriptor: Hybrid Noah models deliver ULEZ compliance and exceptional fuel economy, with the 2ZR-FXE and M20A-FXS powertrains requiring specialist calibration during replacement.
families: 2ZR-FXE - Atkinson-cycle hybrid (R80), inverter cooling pump attention needed
M20A-FXS - Dynamic Force hybrid (R90), electric VVT-iE system integration
Petrol engine and electric motor(s) work in tandem for optimal efficiency
Regenerative braking recharges the hybrid battery during deceleration
ECU manages seamless transitions between electric and petrol power
importantNotes: Hybrid replacements require specialist calibration of MG1/MG2 motors
Battery health check recommended during any hybrid powertrain replacement
ULEZ exemption preserved with genuine Toyota-spec hybrid rebuilds

engineYears.h2: Toyota Noah Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Toyota Noah's production history, organised so UK grey import owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: The original R60 Noah introduced Toyota's family MPV formula to the UK grey import market, powered by the robust 1AZ-FE petrol engine.
keyChanges: 1AZ-FE 2.0L VVT-i petrol engine standard across range
Optional 4WD system available on AZR65G variant
Voxy twin model shares platform and powertrain
knownFor: Simple, reliable engineering ideal for high-mileage use
Timing chain tensioner wear emerges as key maintenance item
Strong parts compatibility with Voxy and early Estima
Popular with private-hire operators for durability

Improved emissions and fuel economy for UK compliance
knownFor: Oil consumption emerges on high-mileage 3ZR-FE units
Valvematic system requires regular oil changes to prevent actuator wear
Most searched generation for UK engine replacements
Strong Voxy/Esquire parts interchangeability

Advanced safety tech and infotainment upgrades
knownFor: Hybrid inverter cooling pump failures on high-mileage units
2AR-FE oil consumption addressed with updated piston rings post-2016
ULEZ exemption drives strong demand for hybrid replacements
Specialist calibration required for hybrid ECU and MG1/MG2 sync

M20A-FKS 2.0L petrol and M20A-FXS 2.0L hybrid powertrains
Electric VVT-iE and advanced regenerative braking integration

faq.h2: Toyota Noah Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Toyota Noah engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Toyota Noah engine typically costs £800-£2,400 for petrol variants and £1,500-£3,500 for hybrid models, supply-only. Supply & fit adds £400-£850 depending on location and engine complexity.
keyPoints: Petrol engines (1AZ-FE, 3ZR-FE) start around £800 rebuilt
Hybrid engines (2ZR-FXE) command premium due to specialist calibration
Prices include upgraded components addressing known failure points
Get multiple quotes via EngineMarket to compare specialist rates
items.cta: Compare Toyota Noah engine replacement prices today

items.question: What engine code does my Toyota Noah have?
items.answer: Check your VIN plate, engine bay stamp, or use our DVLA registration lookup to identify your exact Noah engine code - common codes include 1AZ-FE, 3ZR-FE, 3ZR-FAE, 2ZR-FXE and 2AR-FE.
keyPoints: Engine code is stamped on the block near the cylinder head
R60 models (2001-2007) typically use 1AZ-FE
R70/R80 models (2007-2021) use 3ZR-FE, 3ZR-FAE or 2AR-FE
Hybrid R80+ models use 2ZR-FXE or M20A-FXS
items.cta: Verify your Toyota Noah engine code instantly

items.question: Will a Voxy engine fit my Toyota Noah?
items.answer: Yes - the Toyota Voxy shares the same platform and most engine codes with the Noah, making engines interchangeable with minor ECU coding adjustments for trim-specific features.
keyPoints: Voxy and Noah share AZR, ZRR and ZWR chassis families
Engine mounts, wiring harnesses and ECU are compatible
Hybrid systems require specialist calibration after swap
Always confirm exact engine code matches before ordering

items.question: How long does a Toyota Noah engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engines typically dispatch in 3-5 working days; supply & fit bookings at UK specialists take 1-2 days for labour, with total turnaround of 5-7 days from order to road-ready.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engines are bench-tested before dispatch
Hybrid replacements require additional calibration time
Pre-booked fitting slots minimise vehicle downtime
Nationwide delivery available from most suppliers
items.cta: Book your Toyota Noah engine supply & fit slot

items.question: What warranty comes with a Toyota Noah recon engine?
items.answer: Most rebuilt and reconditioned Toyota Noah engines supplied via EngineMarket include a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour at the fitting garage.
keyPoints: Warranty terms vary by supplier - always confirm before ordering
Hybrid powertrain warranties may have mileage caps
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
EngineMarket vets all suppliers for warranty reliability
items.cta: Compare Toyota Noah engine warranty terms

items.question: Can I use a used engine for my Toyota Noah?
items.answer: Yes - used JDM or UK-sourced Noah engines offer the lowest upfront cost (£600-£1,600) but carry higher risk; always request compression test results and mileage verification.
keyPoints: Verify mileage via Japanese auction sheets or DVLA history
Budget for ancillary replacements (water pump, belts, seals)
Used engines typically carry shorter warranties (3-6 months)
Rebuilt engines offer better long-term value for high-mileage vehicles
items.cta: Check used Toyota Noah engine availability and risk assessment

items.question: Is a hybrid Toyota Noah engine worth replacing?
items.answer: Yes - for ULEZ-zone drivers, replacing a failed 2ZR-FXE hybrid powertrain (£1,500-£3,500) preserves zero-charge status and delivers exceptional fuel economy versus buying a new vehicle.
keyPoints: Hybrid replacements maintain ULEZ and CAZ compliance
Specialist calibration ensures MG1/MG2 sync and battery health
Fuel savings of 40-50mpg offset replacement cost over time
EngineMarket connects you with hybrid-certified UK specialists
items.cta: Get quotes for Toyota Noah hybrid engine replacement

items.question: Do I need ECU coding for a Noah engine replacement?
items.answer: Minor ECU adaptation is usually required after fitting a replacement Noah engine, especially for hybrid models; most UK specialists include this in their supply & fit service.
keyPoints: Petrol engines may need idle relearn and VVT-i adaptation
Hybrid systems require MG1/MG2 sync and inverter calibration
Immobiliser reset may be needed if replacing with non-matched ECU
Confirm coding is included before booking supply & fit
items.cta: Find Toyota Noah specialists offering ECU coding

items.question: What oil should I use in a rebuilt Toyota Noah engine?
items.answer: Use Toyota-approved 0W-20 or 5W-30 fully synthetic oil for rebuilt Noah engines, with the first change at 500 miles to remove break-in debris, then every 6,000-8,000 miles.
keyPoints: Follow the viscosity grade specified for your engine code
High-mileage formulations help reduce oil consumption
Hybrid engines benefit from low-viscosity oils for efficiency
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
items.cta: Get Toyota Noah engine oil specification guidance

items.question: How do I know if my Noah needs an engine replacement?
items.answer: Key signs include persistent blue smoke (oil burn), metallic rattling (timing chain), loss of power with warning lights, or hybrid system faults - get a compression test to confirm.
keyPoints: Compression below 120psi on any cylinder indicates rebuild need
Hybrid warning lights often signal inverter or motor issues
Excessive oil consumption (>1L/1,000 miles) warrants replacement
EngineMarket offers free diagnostic guidance before you commit
